name: Chocolate Chip Orange Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Egg white mixed with 1/2 Water; for glaze, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Butter a 9-inch circle baking dish.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Cut the butter into 1/2-inch cubes and distribute them over the flour mixture.
4. Using a pastry blender or two knives held like scissors, cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. In a small bowl, stir together the eggs, orange juice, vanilla extract, and grated orange peel.
6. Add to the flour mixture and stir to combine. The dough will be sticky.
7. With lightly floured hands, knead in the chocolate chips until they are evenly distributed.
8. With lightly floured hands, pat the dough into an 8-inch circle in the center of the baking dish.
9. If desired, brush the egg white mixture over the tops and sides of the dough.
10. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from the oven to a wire rack and cool for 10 minutes.
12. Using a spatula, transfer the scones to a wire rack to cool.
13. Recut into wedges if necessary.
14. Serve warm or allow to cool completely before storing in an air-tight container. These scones freeze well.
